title: A new AI alliance? Samsung and Mistral AI hold key discussions
description: Samsung Electronics and Mistral AI discuss cooperation in AI memory, chip supply chains and semiconductor technology amid growing global demand for AI infrastructure.

title: Tempus AI trial shows AI alerts improve cardiac care across five U.S. health systems
description: Tempus AI's ALERT trial found AI-driven EHR alerts sped up specialist care for heart valve patients across five U.S. health systems. Whether insurers will pay for the tool at scale remains unresolved.

title: What is Project Maven? Pentagon’s flagship AI program powering US strikes on Iran
description: A Pentagon AI program called Project Maven is at the centre of the US strikes against Iran and potentially one of the most consequential transformations of modern warfare. What is it? Project Maven is the Pentagon’s flagship artificial intelligence program, launched in 2017 as a narrow experiment to help military analysts make sense of the [...]
